category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

title.en: China-to-Honduras EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入洪都拉斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入宏都拉斯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Honduras OHN standards context, CREE electricity regulation, ENEE grid coordination, IEC 61851 safety and IEC 61000 EMC baselines, Americas-style 120/240 V 60 Hz supply, likely J1772 / CCS1 connector expectations to be confirmed with CREE / ENEE, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与洪都拉斯OHN标准环境、CREE电力监管、ENEE电网协调、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC基线、美洲体系120/240 V 60 Hz供电、需向CREE / ENEE确认的J1772 / CCS1接口预期，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與宏都拉斯OHN標準環境、CREE電力監管、ENEE電網協調、IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC基線、美洲體系120/240 V 60 Hz供電、需向CREE / ENEE確認的J1772 / CCS1接口預期，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Honduras, the practical gaps are 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid suitability, CREE electricity-sector requirements, ENEE utility coordination for grid-connected installations, OHN or project-level conformity documentation, IEC 61851 safety and IEC 61000 EMC evidence, and connector conversion from China GB/T 20234 to the locally used Americas connector ecosystem. Honduras appears to follow an Americas-style vehicle and electrical environment where SAE J1772 Type 1 AC and CCS1 DC are the likely interoperability targets, but an official Honduras EVSE connector mandate could not be confirmed as of 2026-06-14; confirm the connector, approval route, and utility interconnection requirements with CREE, ENEE, the importer, and the site owner before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入洪都拉斯时，实务差距包括：适配60 Hz / 120-240 V电网、满足CREE电力行业要求、并网安装需与ENEE协调、准备OHN或项目级合格文件、提供IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC证据，以及将中国GB/T 20234接口转换为当地使用的美洲接口体系。洪都拉斯的车辆和电气环境看起来属于美洲体系，SAE J1772 Type 1交流和CCS1直流可能是互操作目标；但截至2026年6月14日，未能确认洪都拉斯官方EVSE接口强制规定。出货前应向CREE、ENEE、进口商和场地方确认接口、审批路径和公用事业并网要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入宏都拉斯時，實務差距包括：適配60 Hz / 120-240 V電網、滿足CREE電力行業要求、併網安裝需與ENEE協調、準備OHN或項目級合格文件、提供IEC 61851安全及IEC 61000 EMC證據，以及將中國GB/T 20234接口轉換為當地使用的美洲接口體系。宏都拉斯的車輛和電氣環境看起來屬於美洲體系，SAE J1772 Type 1交流和CCS1直流可能是互操作目標；但截至2026年6月14日，未能確認宏都拉斯官方EVSE接口強制規定。出貨前應向CREE、ENEE、進口商和場地方確認接口、審批路徑和公用事業併網要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, OHN standards determination, CREE approval, ENEE interconnection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Honduras conformity assessment rules, CREE electricity-sector requirements, ENEE grid-connection requirements, IEC standard editions, connector expectations, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、OHN标准适用裁定、CREE批准、ENEE并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行洪都拉斯合格评定规则、CREE电力行业要求、ENEE并网要求、IEC标准版本、接口预期及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、OHN標準適用裁定、CREE批准、ENEE併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行宏都拉斯合格評定規則、CREE電力行業要求、ENEE併網要求、IEC標準版本、接口預期及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
